title: I grandi magazzini
writer: Mario Camerini, Renato Castellani, Mario Pannunzio
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Assia Noris, Enrico Glori
plot: In a fit of jealousy, store clerk Assia Norris walks out on her boyfriend and heads for a vacation in the Alps, but not before "borrowing" a high-priced ski wardrobe.
